Unnamed: 30: ﻿Inclined to believe that, while the almanac says that this is St John, it would later go on to be St Thomas (which you can find in later almanac years. Church site mentions the first church was small and outgrown pretty quick, and that the present church wasn't built until the 1840s. I imagine its possible that this church is the precursor to St Thomas, then.
